visual_summary: A striped pattern component that can be used for backgrounds or designs. It can be customized to display stripes going left or right. It's a utility component that can be used in various parts of the application.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: Striped Pattern
Description: A striped pattern component that can be used for backgrounds or designs. It can be customized to display stripes going left or right. It's a utility component that can be used in various parts of the application.
Style: minimal
Interactions: none
Tags: background, utility, design

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
